content.problemStatement:
Chef is trying to invent the light bulb that can run at room temperature without electricity. So he has NNN gases numbered from 000 to N−1N - 1N−1 that he can use and he doesn't know which one of the NNN gases will work but we do know it.

Now Chef has worked on multiple search algorithms to optimize search. For this project, he uses a modulo-based search algorithm that he invented himself. So first he chooses an integer KKK and selects all indices iii in increasing order such that i mod K=0i \bmod K = 0imodK=0 and test the gases on such indices, then all indices iii in increasing order such that i mod K=1i \bmod K = 1imodK=1, and test the gases on such indices, and so on.

Given NNN, the index of the gas ppp that will work, and KKK, find after how much time will he be able to give Chefland a new invention assuming that testing 111 gas takes 111 day.

For example, consider N=5,p=2N = 5, p = 2N=5,p=2 and K=3K = 3K=3.


On the 1st1^{st}1st day, Chef tests gas numbered 000 because 0 mod 3=00 \bmod 3 = 00mod3=0.
On the 2nd2^{nd}2nd day, Chef tests gas numbered 333 because 3 mod 3=03 \bmod 3 = 03mod3=0.
On the 3rd3^{rd}3rd day, Chef tests gas numbered 111 because 1 mod 3=11 \bmod 3 = 11mod3=1.
On the 4th4^{th}4th day, Chef tests gas numbered 444 because 4 mod 3=14 \bmod 3 = 14mod3=1.
On the 5th5^{th}5th day, Chef tests gas numbered 222 because 2 mod 3=22 \bmod 3 = 22mod3=2.
So after 555 days, Chef will be able to give Chefland a new invention


Input Format

The first line of the input contains a single integer TTT denoting the number of test cases. The description of TTT test cases follows.
The first and only line of each test case contains three space-separated integers NNN, ppp, and KKK.


Output Format
For each test case, print a single line containing one integer — after how much time Chef will be able to give Chefland a new invention assuming that testing 111 gas takes 111 day.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Test case 111: On the day 111 Chef will test gas numbered 000 and on the day 222 Chef will test gas numbered 555.
Test case 222: On the day 111 Chef will test gas numbered 000, on the day 222 Chef will test gas numbered 555, on the day 333 Chef will test gas numbered 111, and on the day 444 Chef will test gas numbered 666.
Test case 333: On the day 111 Chef will test gas numbered 000, on the day 222 Chef will test gas numbered 555, on the day 333 Chef will test gas numbered 111, on the day 444 Chef will test gas numbered 666, on the day 555 Chef will test gas numbered 222, on the day 666 Chef will test gas numbered 777, on the day 777 Chef will test gas numbered 333, on the day 888 Chef will test gas numbered 888, and on the day 999 Chef will test gas numbered 444.
Test case 444: On the day 111 Chef will test gas numbered 000, on the day 222 Chef will test gas numbered 555, on the day 333 Chef will test gas numbered 111, on the day 444 Chef will test gas numbered 666, on the day 555 Chef will test gas numbered 222, on the day 666 Chef will test gas numbered 777, on the day 777 Chef will test gas numbered 333, and on the day 888 Chef will test gas numbered 888.
